SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards

Class RewardFunction<ACTION_TYPE>

java.lang.Object
edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards.RewardFunction<ACTION_TYPE>
public abstract class RewardFunction<ACTION_TYPE> extends Object
Represents a configurable bounded reward function. There are three flavors of a reward function that determines how much of a transition the reward function examines (and therefore how granular) the reward function is. How much of a transition is controled via the RewardType enum. Note that you *must* implement whichever abstract method corresponds to your choice of RewardType passed into the constructor.
Author:
Andrew Wood

  • Constructor Details

    • RewardFunction

      public RewardFunction(RewardType type, int agentId)

  • Method Details

    • getType

      public final RewardType getType()

    • getAgentId

      public final int getAgentId()

    • getLowerBound

      public abstract double getLowerBound()

    • getUpperBound

      public abstract double getUpperBound()

    • getStateReward

      public abstract double getStateReward(GameView state)
      A method to calculate the reward only as a function of the current state of the game R(s). This method *must* be implemented when the RewardType has value STATE
      Parameters:
      state - The state of the game
      Returns:
      the reward R(s)

    • getHalfTransitionReward

      public abstract double getHalfTransitionReward(GameView state, ACTION_TYPE action)
      A method to calculate the reward only as a function of the current state of the game and action chosen R(s,a). This method *must* be implemented when the RewardType has value HALF_TRANSITION
      Parameters:
      state - The state of the game
      action - The action taken in that state
      Returns:
      the reward R(s,a)

    • getFullTransitionReward

      public abstract double getFullTransitionReward(GameView state, ACTION_TYPE action, GameView nextState)
      A method to calculate the reward as a function of the game you were in, the action selected in that state, and how that action resolved R(s,a,s'). This method *must* be implemented when the RewardType has value FULL_TRANSITION
      Parameters:
      state - The state of the game
      action - The action taken in that state
      nextState - The state of the game after the action resolved in the state it was selected in
      Returns:
      the reward R(s,a,s')

    • getBounds

      public final edu.bu.jmat.Pair<Double,Double> getBounds()
